name: Phobia drone oc Melody
description:
Info of my oc:

((Sorry for the watermarks on the drawings since it's just to make sure that art theft can't easily happen))

Melody was originally a female worker drone who has a semi-messy ponytail hairstyle that is tied up with a hairband that looks a little like a butterfly. She has silver colored eyes, whiteish colored hair.

Her usual outfit before being turned is a pure white jacket with a dark gray t-shirt underneath it, black leggings and a pair of gray sneakers.

After being turned, her outfit was ripped and has tears in it in some places from her transformation. Examples: The bottom of her jacket and sleaves being ripped and that her black leggings has some tears in them.

Melody's brother is called Zack, he is the older one of the both of them and he is unturned and still is a worker drone. Zack has no clue his younger sister has turned so is still trying to find her, thinking that she had just simply ran off and not that Melody had turned into a phobia drone.

Zack wears a black t-shirt with a pair of jeans and black boots. He has short and messy black hair (tried to show in the drawing but just imagine the gray hair as black). Zack also has silver colored eyes as well just like his younger sister.

Zack is 19 and 6 months while Melody is a month over 18, roughly a year and a half age difference between them.

Melody's personality is more calm and curious though can get cautious and wary if she thinks someone is trying to trick her or hurt her or her brother. Her personality somewhat changes when she gets turned into a phobia drone as sometimes she "blacks out" and gets overly aggressive but snaps out of it if the person who triggered her to get aggressive is unconscious or has fled. After the "black out", Melody originally feels panicked but over the time she has reluctantly grown used to it and "black outs" happen less and she becomes more aware at times with what she is doing but still has a massive dislike to it.

Melody phobia that she turns into is called "Dracophobia", also known as the fear/phobia of dragons.

Phobia drone form: Melody grows a pair of dark grayish black leathery semi-bat like wings (though slightly worn down and has a few areas that have a few little holes/breaks) on her back that have clawed like hands on them that can grab and hold onto things which means trying to climb higher places wont be a good idea as she is far more agile in climbing. She also grows a long tail that has a three spike-like end that is sharp and also prehensile so she is able to wrap it around things and hang upside down with it if she choses to. Another thing that changes to her is that she has grown three spikes on her back that can rise up when threaten, Melody's hands also had changed as they grew claws over her fingers that are quite sharp. Melody's eyes has change a bit as her pupils turn to almost permanent slits, she also now has four fang-like teeth (two main ones on the top jaw and two smaller ones, which are half the size of the ones on the top jaw, on the bottom jaw) that are razor sharp.

Random facts:

  • While I was looking for music to listen to while drawing, I had found that the songs 'The Mind Electric' by Miracle Musical and 'JOE' by AJR ((Both when Melody was a worker drone)), and maybe 'Animals' by Stomach Book ((when she was turning into a phobia drone)) seem to fit her surprisingly well even though she was a random character I made up for only one story and originally had no lore actually planned.

  • Melody, when she first met Thad (when he is a phobia drone), was slightly calm with him being near her though that doesn't mean she wasn't being a little wary.

  • Zack and Melody both came from a different colony than the one Doll was from but the colony soon ended up destroyed by phobia drones, which was the cause of the siblings to flee and leave their old home. Their parents are presumed dead as it had been a
creator: KitDragonKat24
